title: Manufacturing Engineer - Akzo Nobel India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Akzo Nobel India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India:
Akzo Nobel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
